ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment item */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment item */,
  "equipment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment type (e.g., melee, ranged) */,
  "equipment_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment subtype (e.g., one-handed, two-handed) */,
  "damage_dice" TEXT /* Damage dice for the equipment item (e.g., 1D8) */,
  "str_req" INTEGER /* Strength requirement for the equipment item */,
  "dex_req" INTEGER /* Dexterity requirement for the equipment item */,
  "enc" INTEGER /* Encumbrance value for the equipment item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the equipment item (e.g., medium, light) */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the equipment item in silver pieces (SP) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the equipment is made of (e.g., steel, wood) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity level of the equipment (e.g., common, rare, legendary) */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Current durability of the equipment */,
  "max_durability" INTEGER /* Maximum durability of the equipment */,
  "enchantment" TEXT /* Any enchantments applied to the equipment */,
  "special_effects" TEXT /* Special effects or abilities the equipment provides */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_equipment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_type_id") REFERENCES equipment_types ("equipment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_equipment_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_subtype_id") REFERENCES equipment_subtypes ("equipment_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "equipment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "equipment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_subtypes" (
  "equipment_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment subtype */,
  "equipment_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment subtype */,
  "equipment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment subtype */,
  "category" TEXT /* Broader category of the subtype */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_sets" (
  "equipment_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment set */,
  "equipment_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment set */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character who owns the set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment set */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_sets_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who controls the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Character class (e.g., warrior, mage) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Character race (e.g., human, elf) */,
  "background" TEXT /* Character background or backstory */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to a profile picture of the player */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the player last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_set_items" (
  "equipment_set_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment set item */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment item */,
  "equipment_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment set */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment item in the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_set_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_set_items_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_set_items_equipment_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_set_id") REFERENCES equipment_sets ("equipment_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_equipment" (
  "character_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character's equipment */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment item assigned to the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_equipment_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_stats" (
  "equipment_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment stat */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment item */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the stat (e.g., damage roll, critical hit chance) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the stat */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the stat */,
  "temporary_modifier" REAL /* Temporary modifier to the stat (e.g., from a potion or spell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_stats_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_stats" (
  "character_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character stat */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the stat (e.g., strength, dexterity, hit points) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the stat */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the stat */,
  "temporary_modifier" REAL /* Temporary modifier to the stat (e.g., from a potion or spell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_stats_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "game_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game session */,
  "game_master_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game master */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game session in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game session took place (e.g., a specific dungeon, city) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_master_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_master_id") REFERENCES game_masters ("game_master_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_masters" (
  "game_master_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game master */,
  "game_master_name" TEXT /* Name of the game master */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the game master */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the game master */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to a profile picture of the game master */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the game master joined the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_master_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_session_characters" (
  "game_session_character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character's game session */,
  "game_session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_session_character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_session_characters_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_session_characters_game_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("game_session_id")
)
